steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes domestication involving “selective breeding” and refers to “this millennia-long process.” The strongest signal is the TIME SCALE of the transformation: it emphasizes that the process took many generations.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
”Over the course of many generations” conveys the gradual, multi-generational nature of selective breeding. The other choices either add unnecessary illustration, repeat the opening, or shift to an incorrect causal framing.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
